visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator wearing a white hoodie, blue flat cap, and glasses stands in a bright, modern living room. He speaks with expressive hand gestures. A brief 16:9 landscape shot of a sunny outdoor plaza in Cupertino is shown as an insert. (2) Graphic overlays for iPhone 17 appear with yellow borders and phone icons. The background features a cream-colored sofa and soft, warm indoor lighting. The man continues to gesture vigorously toward the camera. (3) Brightly colored geometric overlays (blue, red, yellow) flash on screen as he discusses pricing. A full-screen infographic appears listing promotional items like glass protectors and mobile cases with the 'miko' brand logo clearly visible. (4) Blue iPhone 17 3D models float on screen alongside text indicating a 1000-dollar discount. Recycling icons and logos for Apple and Android are displayed as he explains a trade-in program. (5) A green QR code appears in the center-left of the frame with the handle @miko168. The man points downward toward the screen's edge during his final call to action before the video ends.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: 3ctim. [Subtitle]: 哈囉大家好. (2) [Subtitle]: 現在我人就在美國加州. (3) [Subtitle]: 庫比蒂諾. (4) [Subtitle]: iPhone 17已經正式發表！ (5) [Subtitle]: 相信大家也迫不及待想知道. (6) [Subtitle]: 在台灣去哪裡預約. (7) [Subtitle]: 才是最划算的選擇？ (8) [Slogan]: iPhone 17系列最最優惠就在，米可手機館！ (9) [Subtitle]: 如果你鎖定任何一支的iPhone 17. (10) [Subtitle]: 都可以來米可預約. (11) [Subtitle]: 絕對是最聰明的決定. (12) [Subtitle]: 為什麼這麼說呢？ (13) [Subtitle]: 聽我算筆帳你就懂了. (14) [Variety]: 只要花990元. (15) [Variety]: 市價$3060 專業大全套配件. (16) [Logo]: miko 米可. (17) [Variety]: 新機-$1000 直接減$1000. (18) [Variety]: 全套配件 GET!. (19) [Variety]: 舊機回收再加碼 多折$1000. (20) [Variety]: 現場立即折現. (21) [Variety]: 0元把新機帶回家. (22) [Variety]: 電信綁約超值方案 延長保險優惠. (23) [Slogan]: @miko168.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator speaking to the camera throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male, middle-aged, wearing a white hoodie with a vintage Apple logo, a blue patterned flat cap, and round-rimmed glasses.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern living room with a neutral-toned sofa, soft curtains, and a golden decorative lamp. A secondary location shows a paved urban plaza with buildings and a fountain in Cupertino.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal male speech begins with an enthusiastic greeting, 'Hello everyone'. Upbeat, rhythmic pop BGM starts immediately with a clear kick drum and synth melody. A quick 'whoosh' SFX signals the transition to the Cupertino location clip. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX triggers as the iPhone 17 text appears. The vocal pitch is dynamic, rising to emphasize the announcement of the new phone. The music maintains a steady 126 BPM tempo with bright frequency weight. (3) Continuous 'sparkle' SFX layer over the vocals as price points are mentioned. The narrator’s articulation is extremely clear and enunciated. A percussive 'hit' SFX punctuates the mention of the 990-dollar offer, emphasizing the value proposition. (4) Technical whoosh sounds accompany the sliding of mobile phone icons on the visual track. The BGM complexity increases slightly with additional electronic textures during the trade-in explanation. The speaker's dominance and confidence are high, driving the sales narrative forward. (5) A final 'ding' SFX coincides with the QR code appearance. The music continues at a consistent volume until the very end, where a quick hard cut closes the audio track. The overall mix is clean with professional-grade spectral brightness and minimal noise interference.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote pre-ordering the iPhone 17 at 'miko' mobile shop by highlighting exclusive discounts and gift packages. The video uses high-energy delivery and colorful graphics to create a sense of urgency and value.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly names '米可手機館' (miko) and explains their specific promotional offers and trade-in deals, ending with a QR code for their Line account.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media marketing video using classic 'talking head' style mixed with rapid graphic inserts for visual engagement.
